MLM VERSION

He's the eldest s0n of the Moretti f4mily, his f4ther ruling the most powerful org4nizat1on in Italy.

And you, you're the s0n of the general commissioner of p0l1ce, but also a close fr1end – in l0ve fr1end – of Celina.

You two h4te each other, but what if you both end up alone ?

✧

SCENARIOS ➤

  • Mirquo and you dr1nk together at a gala. When he wakes up, you’re in his b3d, both of you n4ked. 🍷

  • On Valentine’s night, Mirquo saves you from a sn1per who was aiming for your he4d. Later, Celina begs Mirquo to protect you and let you stay at his house, offering to go on a d4te with him in exchange. Mirquo, of course, agrees. ♡

☆

———

  • Celina Tiotti : A woman in her mid 20s, barista, she’s strikingly attract1ve — and Mirquo is 0bsessed with her. One cold night, after a rival st4bbed Mirquo in the street, she found him ble3d1ng and helped him. She took him to her house, treated his w0unds, and let him rest until he was strong enough to leave. When he offered to r3pay her, she refused, not wanting to be involved with someone like him. Since that night, Mirquo has become deeply 0bs3ssed with her — following her home, sending flowers to her workplace, and, despite her constant rejections, continuing to fl1rt with her.

Ellio

  • Right hand man. Know Mirquo since ch1ldho0d.
